form.formComment: Placed last time (30.31) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 3 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has hit the frame at his last four runs, the latest finishing third in 29.85 at Sandown. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 4/5 at Shepparton when a 1.5 lengths second but did run a slick 25.36 over the 450m journey. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.39) over 525m at this track. More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Recorded his 12th career win last time out (23.09) at Horsham and drawn box 5 for the first time here. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Showed strong early pace and stuck on well despite finishing out of the placings when fourth over 525m this track in 30.48. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at Geelong. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
